title: clethra ferruginea
intro: Clethra ferruginea, also known as the rusty-leaf clethra or rusty clethra, is a flowering plant native to the southeastern United States and Mexico, characterized by its reddish-brown leaves and fragrant white flowers. The medicinal properties of clethra ferruginea are rooted in its use as a diaphoretic and expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, lower fever, and alleviate sinus pressure, making it a valuable remedy for treating respiratory infections. Clethra ferruginea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe and calm respiratory issues.
